title: Insane's Experience Overhaul
description: Enhanced Experience with better Player xp and more experience dropped. Plus customizations.
body:
## Summary

Experience Overhaul is a mod that enhances Experience, Anvil and Enchanting with many customizations.

## The mod
### Experience
#### Players
* Players now drop 80% of experience and no longer 7 levels at most
* Levelling up always requires a fixed amount of experience instead of exponential
* Players pick up experience faster

#### Dropped
* Mobs drop more experience per equipment piece (even more if enchanted)
* Bottle o' enchanting always drop a full level of experience
* You now get experience for shearing sheep, gather honey(comb) from bee hives and brushing suspicious blocks
* You can apply a multiplier on how much experience mobs, blocks and in general (disabled by default)

This mod was part of [Insane's Survival Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iguanatweaks-reborn) up to 1.20.1.

## Links
